title: The Original Minecraft Logo
description: I put the Minecraft Logo from Beta 1.4 to Release 1.15.2 back into the game. It is similar to the one from 1.16 to 1.19.4 besides the thick outline.
body:
I put the Minecraft Logo from Beta 1.4 to Release 1.15.2 back into the game. It is similar to the one from 1.16 to 1.19.4 besides the thick outline.

Notice: This resource pack cannot be 100% accurate to how it was from 1.15.2 and before because in 1.20, they changed the size of which the Minecraft logo can be. This means that the logo cannot be as big as it was in those earlier versions. It shouldn't be much of a problem for anyone who doesn't care or uses something like FancyMenu (and in that case, why are you using this resource pack?)
